images.title: Cèze Génèse Walking 5923.JPG
images.description:
Génèse is in the commune of Méjannes-le-Clap, ( post code is F30630 and INSEE 30230). in Gard, France, while beaches on the other side ot the Cèze are in Saint-Privat-de-Champclos (F30430 and INSEE 30293). This is the naturist area in the Gorges de Cèze, much is owned by the Conseil General. This Éspece Naturel Departmentale covers 3000 ha of Karst landscape.

Walking in from Plage de Quittard.
